calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Probate Code Section 15403
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Probate Code Section 15403
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bonnie Landles-Dowling for Albert Jung

The Court inquired if San Francisco is the proper venue for this matter. Ms. Landles stated that the only asset left in the Trust is in San Francisco, that the Trustee has no office in San Francisco, and the day to day administration does take place here as the multi-unit property requires a lot of personal presence. The Court stated that it needs to see a Petition to Change Venue or a supplement that explains venue. Ms. Landles stated that a supplemental declaration was filed yesterday. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms, etc. is continued to April 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to make sure the Court's questions have been answered.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
